summary: VenuLock Mobile Hero + Search Module Visual Refinement Testing Complete. All 23 features tested - 100% PASS. Verified all 10-point polish: (1) Ivory active tab bg (#FAF6EC), (2) Gold container border, (3) Gold icons visible (text-[#C8A960] with strokeWidth=2), (4) Hero radial spotlight gradient, (5) Brighter subheading (white/60), (6) Gradient CTA with gold shadow, (7) Premium trust badges visible, (8) Proper spacing, (9) Darker dropdown bg (#222), (10) Event type (8 options) and guest count (6 options). Desktop regression test passed - no issues.
critical_code_review_comments: Mobile hero badge text is brighter gold (#C8A960/80) - VERIFIED
Tab toggle container has gold border (border-[#C8A960]/20) - VERIFIED
Active City tab has ivory bg (#FAF6EC) and dark text (#1A1A1A) - VERIFIED
Inactive Location tab has transparent bg and lighter text (white/60) - VERIFIED
Tab state switches correctly when clicking between City/Location - VERIFIED
Dropdown icons are gold (#C8A960) with w-[18px] h-[18px] size - VERIFIED
City dropdown list has darker bg (#222) for better contrast - VERIFIED
Event Type dropdown shows all 8 options: Wedding, Birthday/Anniversary, Corporate Event, Cocktail/Reception, Conference/Seminar, Exhibition, Private Party, Other - VERIFIED
Guest Count dropdown shows all 6 options: Under 50, 50-100, 100-250, 250-500, 500-1000, 1000+ - VERIFIED
CTA button has gradient (from-[#D4B76A] to-[#C8A960]) with gold shadow - VERIFIED
Reassurance line 'Free venue matching. No booking pressure.' visible - VERIFIED
Trust badges all visible: Verified Venues, Transparent Pricing, Booking Assistance - VERIFIED
Browse all venues link visible and gold colored - VERIFIED
Mobile hamburger menu works with all navigation items - VERIFIED
Desktop header, hero, search section all working - NO REGRESSION
Desktop city dropdown, event type, guest count dropdowns all working - NO REGRESSION
Desktop CTA navigation works correctly - NO REGRESSION
context_for_next_testing_agent: Mobile visual refinement (iteration 53) complete. All 10-point polish verified: ivory active tabs, gold borders/icons, gradient CTA with shadow, brighter text, darker dropdown bg, trust badges visible. Desktop regression passed. Key verified classes: bg-[#FAF6EC] (active tab), text-[#C8A960] (icons), bg-[#222] (dropdown), from-[#D4B76A] to-[#C8A960] (CTA gradient), shadow-[0_2px_16px_rgba(200,169,96,0.3)] (CTA shadow), text-[#C8A960]/80 (hero badge), text-white/60 (subheading).
